name: Tiramisu- Cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat egg yolks with sugar until light in color and fluffy, about 5 minutes.
2. Stir in the coffee and Brandy or almond extract.
3. Place the mixture over a double boiler set over gently simmering water. Whisk continuously for about 7 minutes, until thickened.
4. Allow to cool completely.
5. Beat the Mascarpone cheese until smooth and fold into the egg yolk mixture.
6. Whip the cream until stiff peaks form, then stir in 1/4 cup of the mixture. Fold in the remaining cream.
7. Combine the strong coffee with 2 Tablespoons (Tbsp) Brandy or almond extract.
8. Arrange half of the Ladyfingers in a 11x7-inch glass baking dish and brush with half of the coffee mixture.
9. Spread with half of the cream mixture.
10. Repeat layers, then top with chocolate.
11. Cover and refrigerate overnight. The tiramisu can be frozen for up to 2 weeks; let it thaw in the refrigerator for 24 hours before serving.
